ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "capital_city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the capital city of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code for the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the city belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "x" INTEGER /* X coordinate of the city */,
  "y" INTEGER /* Y coordinate of the city */,
  "eu_member" INTEGER /* Whether the city is in the EU */,
  "state_province" TEXT /* State or province where the city is located */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the city in meters above sea level */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city in decimal degrees */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city in decimal degrees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city the dataset belongs to */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "dataset_category" TEXT /* Category of the dataset */,
  "dataset_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_datasets_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_datasets_dataset_name FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_name") REFERENCES dataset_types ("type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset type */,
  "type_category" TEXT /* Category of the dataset type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES city_datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, data analyst, researcher) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user who accessed the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user who accessed the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES city_datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_version_history" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "version_author" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes in this version */,
  "version_comment" TEXT /* Comment describing the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_version_history_version_author FOREIGN KEY ("version_author") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_version_history_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES city_datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_export_history" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being exported */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user exporting the dataset */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was exported */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data */,
  "export_status" TEXT /* Status of the export */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_export_history_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES city_datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_export_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
